zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Clarell Jr於1402年出生在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾阿爾德瓦可時，他的父親Thomas Clarell Sr.38歲，母親Matilda Montgomery23歲。他於大約1408年5月8日與Elizabeth Scrope在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年7月在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾迪可爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Clarell Jr于1402年出生在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾阿爾德瓦可时，他的父亲Thomas Clarell Sr.38岁，母亲Matilda Montgomery23岁。他于大约1408年5月8日与Elizabeth Scrope在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年7月在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾迪可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Clarell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Catalan: from clavell ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.

variants.name: Clavel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Alfredo, Angel, Bernardina, Carlos, Consuelo, Fernando, Gustavo, Jeronimo, Jorge, Luis, Margarita.  French Andre, Eugenie, Fernande, Jean-Claude, Pierre.
Spanish: from clavel ‘clove’, earlier also ‘nail’, applied as a metonymic occupational name for a spice trader or a nail maker.
French: from Old French clavel ‘bolt (of a door or gate)’ or ‘nail, link, ring (of chain mail)’, used as a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller. Compare Clewell .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Clarell Jr was born in 1402, in Aldwark, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Clarell Sr., was 38 and his mother, Matilda Montgomery, was 23. He married Elizabeth Scrope about 8 May 1408, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in July 1450, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Clarell Jr est né en 1402, à Aldwark, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Clarell Sr., avait 38 ans et sa mère, Matilda Montgomery, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Scrope environ 8 mai 1408, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en juillet 1450, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Tickhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England: Aldwark, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Clarell Jr 1402 in Aldwark, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Clarell Sr. 38 und seine Mutter Matilda Montgomery 23. Er hat um 8. Mai 1408 in Yorkshire, England Elizabeth Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb im Juli 1450 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Tickhill, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Scrope circa 8 maggio 1408, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel luglio 1450, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Clarell Jrが1402年にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアアルドワークで生まれた時，父Thomas Clarell Sr.は38歳，母Matilda Montgomeryは23歳であった。約1408年5月8日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでElizabeth Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年7月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアティックヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Clarell Jr(이)가 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 알드워크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Clarell Sr.(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda Montgomery(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1408년 5월 8일 영국 요르크실르에서 Elizabeth Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 7월 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 티크힐에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Clarell Jr nasceu em 1402, em Aldwark, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Clarell Sr., tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Matilda Montgomery, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Scrope aproximadamente 8 de maio de 1408, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em julho de 1450, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Aldwark, Yorkshire, England: Aldwark, North Yorkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Clarell Jr родился в 1402 г. в местности алдварк, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Clarell Sr. было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda Montgomery, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Scrope около 8 мая 1408 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер июль 1450 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности тиккхилл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Elizabeth Scrope aproximadamente 8 de mayo de 1408, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en julio de 1450, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Tickhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
